data.subject: Unable to log in after password reset
data.description: I reset my password using the forgot password flow but now I get a 401 error every time I try to log in. I have cleared cookies and tried incognito mode.

data.subject: Data export failing with timeout error
data.description: When I try to export more than 10,000 records the job runs for about 5 minutes and then fails silently. No error message is shown in the UI.

data.subject: Billing discrepancy on latest invoice
data.description: Our latest invoice shows a charge for 150 seats but we only have 120 active users. Please review and issue a credit if applicable.

data.subject: API rate limiting is too aggressive
data.description: We are hitting 429 errors after only 50 requests per minute. Our contract states a limit of 200 req/min. Can you check our tier?

data.subject: Integration with Slack stopped working
data.description: The Slack integration was working fine until yesterday. Now no notifications are being sent. We have verified the webhook URL is correct.

data.subject: Need help configuring SSO with Okta
data.description: We are trying to set up SAML SSO with Okta but keep getting a metadata parsing error. Attached our IdP metadata XML for reference.

data.subject: CSV import rejecting valid records
data.description: Importing a CSV with 5,000 rows fails at row 2,341. The error says invalid date format but the dates are in ISO 8601.

data.subject: Performance degradation during peak hours
data.description: Response times have jumped from ~200ms to ~2s between 9am and 11am EST every weekday for the past two weeks.

data.subject: Missing data in sync run report
data.description: The sync completed successfully according to the status but the report shows 0 records processed. The source definitely has data.
